summary: Updated GALE01 THP decoder symbol metadata, primarily by marking many internal `dolphin/thp` functions and data objects as local instead of global, correcting one THP function size, splitting THP rodata into `__THPJpegNaturalOrder` plus `__THPAANScaleFactor`, and removing tiny placeholder labels around 0x803303BC/0x803303C0. The PR also adjusted a small `.sdata` split boundary between `lb_0192.c` and `lb_0198.c`, taught rust-utils to include `config/**/{symbols,splits}.txt` in its source-file glob, updated a Vim label grep helper to search generated build asm labels, bumped serde lockfile versions, and made `M2C_ERROR` call sites carry unknown-instruction text as comments.
what_changed: Changed `__THPPrepBitStream`, many `THPDec_8033xxxx` routines, THP decompression/Huffman helpers, THP data/BSS/SBSS/SData2 objects, and several adjacent GXInit sdata2 constants from `scope:global` to `scope:local` in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`.
Corrected `THPDec_803302EC` size from `0xD0` to `0xD8` and removed separate `fn_803303BC` and `fn_803303C0` 4-byte entries, making the subsequent layout consistent with the adjusted size.

Split rodata at `0x803B9410`: `__THPJpegNaturalOrder` changed from a `0x90` global byte object to a `0x50` local byte object, and new local double object `__THPAANScaleFactor` was added at `0x803B9460` with size `0x40`.
Moved `.sdata` range `0x804D3800..0x804D3828` entirely under `melee/lb/lb_0198.c` in `config/GALE01/splits.txt`, removing the prior tiny `lb_0192.c` `.sdata` slice.
Added `config/**/{symbols,splits}.txt` to the rust-utils `SRC_FILES` glob set.

Changed `M2C_ERROR` from variadic `M2C_ERROR(...)` to single-parameter `M2C_ERROR(desc)` and rewrote existing unknown `cror` instruction call sites in `ftCo_ItemThrow.c` as comment arguments such as `M2C_ERROR(/* unknown instruction : cror eq, gt, eq */);`.
Updated `tools/vimrc` `LblGrep` to search generated build asm labels matching `^\.(fn|obj) <args>` under `build/GALE01/asm/**/*.s` instead of old label lines under `expected/dump/**/*.s`.
Bumped locked `serde` and `serde_derive` versions from `1.0.195` to `1.0.196` in `Cargo.lock`.
smart_moves: Used symbol scope metadata to distinguish internal THP implementation details from exported/global symbols without renaming uncertain address-based placeholders.
Corrected rodata granularity by separating JPEG natural-order data from AAN scale-factor doubles, which gives future decompilation a cleaner data boundary and more meaningful object typing.
Fixed the THP text boundary by adjusting `THPDec_803302EC` size rather than keeping artificial 4-byte `fn_` labels in the middle of the region.
Expanded tooling globs so symbol and split configuration files can be found by rust-utils workflows, reducing the chance that config-only changes are missed by repository tooling.
Preserved m2c unknown-instruction diagnostics as comments while making the macro interface explicit, keeping the decompiled C readable without treating the text as real macro tokens.
decomp_lessons: When importing or refreshing SDK/library symbols, check `scope:local` versus `scope:global`; many internal THP decoder helpers and tables should remain local even if they have recognizable names.
If a rodata object seems oversized, verify whether adjacent typed constants are being swallowed; here a `0x90` byte table became a `0x50` byte table plus a `0x40` double table.
Tiny placeholder functions immediately after a function may indicate a size/boundary error rather than real callable symbols; size correction can remove bogus labels.
Split-file ownership matters even for very small `.sdata` ranges; a 4-byte slice was merged into the following source file’s `.sdata` range to keep section ownership contiguous.
For m2c-generated unknown instructions, comment-style macro arguments are a safe way to retain the disassembly note at the source location.
naming_conventions: Internal THP SDK-style helpers use double-underscore names such as `__THPPrepBitStream`, `__THPDecompressiMCURow640x480`, `__THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY`, and should be marked local when evidence indicates file-local scope.
Unknown or not-yet-decompiled THP functions keep address-derived names like `THPDec_803300E0` rather than speculative semantic names.
THP JPEG constants use SDK-style names such as `__THPJpegNaturalOrder` and `__THPAANScaleFactor` with explicit object data typing.
Generated build asm labels searched by Vim are expected in `.fn` or `.obj` form, matching the updated `LblGrep` pattern.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Adjust function sizes and remove artificial `fn_` labels when contiguous assembly indicates the earlier split was wrong.
Use `scope:local` in `symbols.txt` to prevent internal THP objects from being treated as exported global symbols.
Represent unhandled PowerPC condition-register instructions such as `cror eq, gt, eq` with `M2C_ERROR(/* unknown instruction ... */)` at the relevant C control-flow point.
Improve local assembly navigation by grepping `.fn`/`.obj` labels in `build/GALE01/asm/**/*.s`.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that decompile or rename `THPDec_803300E0` through `THPDec_803313D0`.
Check whether `__THPAANScaleFactor` and `__THPJpegNaturalOrder` were later moved into a THP header or C source file.
Search for additional `M2C_ERROR(/* unknown instruction : cror` call sites to see whether this comment-argument pattern became standard.
Look for later tooling changes involving `config/**/{symbols,splits}.txt` to understand rust-utils expectations for config files.
